raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Maria?","description":"Safe opener that lets Maria set the frame before any growth topic is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team rituals","name":"How has your participation in team rituals felt lately?","description":"Surfaces whether her reduced engagement is about energy, fit, or unresolved context.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What is mentoring giving you right now?","description":"Checks whether mentoring is active development work or a holding pattern without presuming either.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next level concrete","name":"What would make the next level feel concrete for you?","description":"Pushes from abstract ambition into the specific shape of Principal-plus scope and expectations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Future scope","name":"Where do you want your scope to be wider than it is now?","description":"Gets at the kind of work and influence she wants more of, without assuming a role change.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision readout","name":"What did you take from last cycle's decision?","description":"Surfaces whether she has a concrete read on the gap or is still carrying ambiguity.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Missing evidence","name":"What part of that decision still feels incomplete to you?","description":"Invites the unresolved question to surface without forcing a confrontation frame.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager investment","name":"What should I change in how I'm supporting your growth?","description":"Opens the manager's side of the investment conversation before asking for the employee's trade-offs.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What would you need to stop doing to make room for the next step?","description":"Forces a real trade-off between current commitments and future development.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've talked through, what do you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?","description":"Closes on a concrete near-term commitment without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
